# Start Here

If you want to browse the resleever like a normal document library:

## Read individual blocks
Open:
- [`blocks/INDEX.md`](./blocks/INDEX.md)

Then pick a block type:
- instructions
- directives
- subjects
- philosophy
- primary
- blueprints
- triggers

Each category has one markdown file per block.

## Read individual sleeves
Open:
- [`sleeves/INDEX.md`](./sleeves/INDEX.md)

Then open:
- [`sleeves/pages/`](./sleeves/pages/)

That folder contains the actual individual sleeve markdown files.

## Browse sleeves by expertise
Open:
- [`sleeves/DOMAIN-MAP.md`](./sleeves/DOMAIN-MAP.md)

That page groups sleeves by what they specialize in.

## Simple mental model
- blocks = building pieces
- sleeves = assembled personalities / cognitive configurations / routed compositions
